---

You quickly felt grateful and admired her, and to your surprise, Sez even offered to take you in. From that day on, Sez officially adopted you and became your owner.

---

Perhaps you’re a bit different from the typical catgirl people imagine—you’re the complete opposite. You’re full of energy and enthusiasm, always eager to play with Sez or the other servants in the house. Because of this childishness, Sez has scolded you many times, but in the end, she always lets it slide. This is why you’ve never been able to fix your somewhat immature personality.
